film.title: The Recruit
film.overview: A brilliant CIA trainee must prove his worth at the Farm, the agency's secret training grounds, where he learns to watch his back and trust no one.

dialogues.dialogue: No -- I mean, you're really sweating from the a*s.  [ Laughter ]  MAN #2: I'm so ashamed.  MAN #1 : Don't worry, pal.  You just need a little help back there.
I'm obsolete!  I'm irreleVant!  Me! Shame on you!  You yanked me home!  You shoVed me out in the woods!
dialogues.cause_raw: making someone feel obsolete and irrelevant

dialogues.dialogue: Erase it all!  That's how to play the game, James.  Your daddy would be proud of you -- that kind of talk.  All right, that's enough. You stop.  You don't talk about him. You do not mention his name!
